name: CyberArk Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures CyberArk access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT c.id, c.username, c.email, e.termination_date FROM cyberark_users c JOIN employees e ON LOWER(c.email) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(c.active, true) = true
remediation: Disable or remove accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours. Automate offboarding workflows where possible.
